description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular frame with a prominent roll cage structure in bright red, enveloping the entire body for enhanced protection. The vehicle is equipped with six large, rugged wheels designed for off-road and urban terrain, each with a distinctive red and black color scheme. The body is predominantly black with red accents, including reinforced side panels and roof hatches, suggesting modular armor or access points. The open cabin design reveals multiple seats and what appear to be control consoles, with additional protective bars and rails along the sides and rear. The front of the vehicle is outfitted with a reinforced bumper and grill, as well as visible exhaust or intake pipes, emphasizing its tactical and durable build. The overall design is aggressive and utilitarian, optimized for both crew safety and operational versatility in urban environments.
description: A heavily armored, six-wheeled combat tactical vehicle with a red roll cage, black body, and rugged off-road tires, featuring multiple protective bars and open cabin seating.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced bumper, grill, and prominent roll cage structure, with the open cabin and front wheels clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the six large wheels, side armor panels, and the extended roll cage, as well as visible roof hatches and side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rear protective bars, open seating area, and the back wheels, emphasizing the vehicle's robust frame and rear access.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the wheels, side armor, and roll cage, with additional visibility of the rear seating and structural supports.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two visible weapon mounts on the roof, centrally located, likely for machine guns or similar armaments.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with visible reinforced panels on the sides, front, and roof; armor appears thick and angular, with sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid color scheme with red and black; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread patterns and reinforced sidewalls.
